company.tagline: Premium engineering studio for product teams.

hero.title: Build digital products that feel years ahead.
hero.subtitle: We design and engineer high-performance websites, mobile apps, software platforms, and AI systems that convert and scale.

services.title: High‑performance Websites
services.description: Conversion-first websites with cinematic interactions, SEO structure, and fast Core Web Vitals.

faqs.q: Will the site be fast with animations?
faqs.a: Yes. Motion is designed around performance budgets and tested with real Core Web Vitals targets.
Yes — we can integrate a CMS so your team can update pages without code changes.

services.title: Mobile Apps
services.description: Cross-platform mobile applications engineered for smooth UX, scale, and secure integrations.

services.title: Product Web Apps
services.description: Custom software systems and internal tools that automate operations and reduce manual overhead.

services.title: AI Features & Automation
services.description: Applied AI solutions including copilots, retrieval workflows, and intelligent automation layers.

caseStudies.headline: Rebuilt the customer acquisition funnel with a high-speed product site.
caseStudies.problem: Low conversion and slow page experience on a legacy site.
caseStudies.approach: New narrative, faster architecture, and motion tuned to performance budgets.

caseStudies.headline: Delivered a cross-platform care app with real-time patient workflows.
caseStudies.problem: Fragmented UX and inconsistent performance across devices.
caseStudies.approach: Streamlined flows, reliable realtime integrations, and rigorous QA.

caseStudies.headline: Built analytics software and AI summaries for dispatch operators.
caseStudies.problem: Manual planning and fragmented data slowed daily ops.
caseStudies.approach: Dashboard UX + automation and AI summaries for rapid decisions.

testimonials.quote: NovaAxis shipped a performance-first website that doubled qualified leads without sacrificing the cinematic feel.
testimonials.name: Aditi

testimonials.quote: The team moved fast, communicated clearly, and delivered an interface that feels genuinely premium on every device.
testimonials.name: Rahul

testimonials.quote: Best vendor experience we’ve had — clean engineering, great motion craft, and everything launched on time.
testimonials.name: Sara

faqs.a: Fixed-scope for well-defined builds, or monthly retainers for iterative product work. We’ll recommend the model that reduces risk.
Most marketing sites ship in 2–6 weeks depending on complexity. We’ll define milestones and a delivery plan in the first call.

faqs.q: Who owns the code and design?
faqs.a: You do. All deliverables and source code are yours after final payment, under the terms of the engagement agreement.

faqs.q: Can you work with our existing team?
faqs.a: Yes — we can integrate with your engineers/designers, or deliver end-to-end with clear handoff documentation.

differentiators.title: Performance budgets
differentiators.detail: Core Web Vitals is a feature — we design motion and 3D around strict budgets.

differentiators.title: Design systems
differentiators.detail: Tokenized UI that scales across pages, campaigns, and product surfaces.

differentiators.title: Security & reliability
differentiators.detail: Hardening basics baked in: headers, validation, safe defaults, and uptime focus.

differentiators.title: AI enablement
differentiators.detail: Applied AI where it matters: copilots, retrieval, automation, and product workflows.

siteSeo.defaultDescription: High-performance websites, apps, software platforms, and AI systems engineered for modern teams.

process.title: Discovery & Positioning
process.detail: We map audience, product goals, and technical constraints to define a clear delivery path.

process.title: Design & Prototype
process.detail: Interface systems, motion language, and narrative prototypes are crafted before heavy build work.

process.title: Build & Integrate
process.detail: Our team ships production-grade code, backend integrations, and QA-tested experiences.

process.title: Launch & Optimize
process.detail: We track key metrics, tune performance, and continuously improve conversion and adoption.

scrollStory.heading: Scroll Through The Build Pipeline
scrollStory.intro: A 3D narrative that transforms from idea to launch as users move down the page.
